spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — Temporal API — PlainDate, PlainTime, ZonedDateTime, Duration, calendars, time zones, arithmetic…

interactive.rationale: 3 buttons / 6 inputs / 1 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: No chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link on the concept page — CLAUDE.md rule #3 says every page must carry the self-heal reference, not rely on the parent feature index.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 2 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus.com/feature link to this page
openQuestions.detail: Per CLAUDE.md rule #3, every concept page must include the https://chromestatus.com/feature/5668291307634688 link directly — it is the self-heal anchor used by the slug-recovery script. Right now the page links only back to the parent feature index.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 2 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept lede with the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: The blurb on the feature index sells one promise; the concept lede frames a different angle. Either reword the lede to echo the blurb's keywords (so visitors recognise they're in the right place) or update the parent blurb.

summary: plaindate-playground under temporal-in-ecma262: 3 pass / 2 partial / 1 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story complete.
